description:
2023 Audi RSQ8 40 Years Edition, 4.0L TC V8, 4WD, 631 bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 439,000 or AED 6,878 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 10,499 KM's - Audi Warranty Valid Until 31st December 2027 or Unlimited KM's - Audi Service Contract Valid Until 31st December 2029 or 75,000 KMs - GCC specification (Al Nabooda) - Price includes VAT 
 - Carbon Fibre Interior - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - Heads Up Display - Adaptive Cruise Control - Heated & Ventilated Seats - Apple CarPlay - Wireless Charging - Soft Close Doors - Electronically Adjustable Seats incl. Memory Function - Climate Controls - Selectable Drive Modes - Panoramic Sunroof - Alcantara Roof Lining - Multi-Functional Steering Wheel - Android Auto - Bluetooth - Satellite Navigation
